decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to utilize the powerful combo of Replenish, Opalescence, and Parallax Wave to overwhelm the opponent. By quickly cycling through the deck with cards like Frantic Search and Intuition, the player aims to set up the combo and control the board with cards like Decree of Silence and Mana Leak. The inclusion of Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing provides additional removal options to deal with threats. The mana base is optimized to support the combo while ensuring consistency in casting spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish a strong board presence through aggressive creatures like Nimble Mongoose and Terravore. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and disrupt opponent's mana base with cards like Armageddon and Wasteland. Additionally, the deck has access to card draw and acceleration with Sylvan Library and Mox Diamond. The inclusion of cards like Weathered Wayfarer and Werebear also help in mana fixing and ramping. Overall, the deck is designed to apply pressure early on and maintain control throughout the game.

The deck focuses on creating a combo using cards like Daru Spiritualist, Nomads en-Kor, and Shaman en-Kor to gain infinite life. This combo is supported by cards like Worthy Cause and Task Force. The deck also includes disruption elements like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The mana base consists of various lands to support the combo pieces and ensure consistency in pulling off the combo. The main objective is to assemble the combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with an infinite life total.

This deck focuses on locking down the opponent with the Stasis enchantment, preventing them from untapping their permanents. By utilizing cards like Gush and Impulse to draw and find key pieces, along with disruption like Daze and Arcane Denial to protect the combo, the deck aims to win through the incremental damage from Black Vise or by bouncing Stasis back to hand to untap its lands with cards like Chain of Vapor. Root Maze can slow down the opponent's plays while Forsaken City ensures that the land untaps each turn to keep Stasis in play.

The main focus of this deck is to use the powerful combo card Replenish to bring back enchantments from the graveyard to overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Attunement and Intuition to fill the graveyard with enchantments and then casting Replenish to bring them all back into play, this deck aims to quickly establish a board presence that can be difficult for opponents to deal with. Other cards like Parallax Wave and Opalescence also contribute to the deck's ability to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Exalted Angel, Meddling Mage, and Terravore while disrupting their mana base with cards like Armageddon and Wasteland. The deck also aims to generate card advantage with Sylvan Library and put pressure on the opponent's resources by using cards like Call of the Herd and Cataclysm. Additionally, the deck includes some removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and ways to ramp up mana with Mox Diamond and Weathered Wayfarer. The overall strategy is to create a fast and powerful board presence while controlling the opponent's resources.

The deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence through aggressive creatures such as Nimble Mongoose and Terravore, while disrupting opponents' strategies with cards like Meddling Mage and Swords to Plowshares. It also has the ability to wipe out opponents' lands with Armageddon and Terravore, making it difficult for them to recover. The deck utilizes a mix of mana acceleration with Mox Diamond and land destruction with Wasteland to maintain control of the game. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with efficient threats and disrupt their game plan to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing a mix of white and blue cards to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Cards like Meddling Mage and Mother of Runes help to hinder the opponent's plays, while cards like Mana Leak and Swords to Plowshares provide removal and counter options. Standstill can be used to stall the game and generate card advantage. The deck also includes some aggressive creatures like Savannah Lions and Silver Knight to pressure the opponent. Overall, this deck aims to control the game and outlast the opponent.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using powerful counter spells and removal, while also using cards that grow stronger as the game progresses. The creatures in the deck, such as Nimble Mongoose, Quirion Dryad, and Psychatog, become more dangerous as they accumulate resources. The deck also includes cards like Gush and Portent to draw cards and manipulate the top of the deck, ensuring card advantage. By disrupting the opponent's game plan and developing a strong board presence, this strategy aims to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly cycle through cards in order to fill the graveyard with enchantments, and then use Replenish to bring them all back onto the battlefield. This combo can be devastating for opponents, especially when combined with cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the board and create a powerful win condition. The inclusion of cards like Frantic Search and Intuition help to dig through the deck and find the necessary pieces to execute the combo efficiently. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful enchantments and control elements.

The deck focuses on playing and protecting Phyrexian Dreadnought while utilizing Stifle to counter any removal attempts. The deck also includes card draw and counter spells to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Back to Basics helps to further slow down the opponent, while Essence Flare provides a backup win condition. The key strategy is to efficiently control the game until the combo of Dreadnought and Stifle can be successfully executed, leading to a quick victory.

The main strategy of this deck is to use the combo of Tinker and Fling to quickly summon Phyrexian Devourer, stack it with +1/+1 counters, and then sacrifice it with Fling to deal massive damage to the opponent. The deck includes various cards to help search for pieces of the combo, accelerate mana production, and protect the combo with cards like Defense Grid. The goal is to assemble the combo as quickly as possible and win the game in a single explosive turn.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly fill up your graveyard with cards that have Madness or can be cast using Threshold, allowing you to efficiently cast powerful creatures like Arrogant Wurm and Roar of the Wurm for a low cost. By utilizing cards like Careful Study and Deep Analysis to draw cards and enable Madness, coupled with counterspells like Circular Logic and Daze for protection, you can overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient plays, putting pressure on them from the early game onwards.

This deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent by aggressively utilizing creatures with the madness and threshold mechanics. It focuses on efficiently discarding cards to generate tempo advantage and fueling cards like Arrogant Wurm and Basking Rootwalla. The deck also contains powerful disruption spells like Daze and Mana Leak to control the game and protect its threats. Survival of the Fittest provides additional consistency by allowing the deck to search for key creatures. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive game plan.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures with abilities like Madness and Threshold to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Basking Rootwalla and Wild Mongrel to discard cards and activate powerful effects, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. Survival of the Fittest helps to search for key creatures, while Counterspell and Mana Leak provide disruption and protection. The deck also includes card draw, bounce spells, and a splash of control elements to support its aggressive game plan.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Survival of the Fittest card to search for and put creatures into the graveyard, then bring them back to the battlefield using Goblin Welder and other recursion cards. This strategy aims to control the game by disrupting opponents with cards like Defense Grid, Winter Orb, and Ensnaring Bridge, while also having access to removal spells like Red Elemental Blast and Crumble. The mana base includes cards like Birds of Paradise and the powerful Gaea's Cradle to ramp up resources for the player's game plan.
